description_long: This is a tall, rectangular metal storage cabinet with a matte black body and two blue hinged doors. The cabinet features three spacious interior shelves and a large upper compartment, providing ample storage space for tools, equipment, or supplies. The doors are solid and appear to be made of steel, with visible hinges but no obvious handles. The interior is open and unobstructed, allowing for easy access to stored items. The cabinet stands freely and is suitable for placement in garages, workshops, or urban utility spaces. Its robust construction and utilitarian design make it ideal for secure storage in demanding environments.
description: A tall, freestanding metal storage cabinet with blue double doors and multiple black interior shelves, designed for secure urban storage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid black cabinet body and one blue door partially open.
description_view_1: Front view with both blue doors fully open, revealing three interior shelves and a large upper compartment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the other blue door partially open, highlighting the cabinet's depth and solid construction.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain, solid black back panel of the cabinet.
